name: distribution packaging and release readiness
summary: Packages the demo sample asset inside the distribution and verifies that a built install can run the public console entry point.
user_visible_flows: installed bnt demo works from a built package, not only editable source checkout
system_flows: package data is included in the distribution
demo command resolves the packaged sample asset through importlib resources
wheel install provides a working bnt entry point
notes: The critical verification path is a real build and isolated install, followed by bnt status and bnt demo.
